title: Let's Go To His House

sections.label: Intro
lines: Oh, the joy when they said, “Let us go, let us go!”
To the house of the Lord, where peace will overflow.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Our feet are standing on sacred ground,
In the gates of the city, where blessings abound.
Jerusalem, a city built strong,
Where hearts and voices together belong.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Pray for the peace that graces her walls,
Harmony echoing through her halls.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let peace reign within your towers,
Let joy fill your streets like showers.
For the sake of love and the bonds we keep,
We’ll sing and dance, our spirits leap.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Brothers and friends, together we sing,
For unity’s beauty, the joy it brings.
A city of refuge, a beacon of light,
Where faith and hope take their flight.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Pray for the peace that graces her walls,
Harmony echoing through her halls.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let peace reign within your towers,
Let joy fill your streets like showers.
For the sake of love and the bonds we keep,
We’ll sing and dance, our spirits leap.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: For the sake of the house of our Lord,
We lift our voices in one accord.
Blessed be those who walk in His ways,
Living in joy for all their days.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let peace reign within your towers,
Let joy fill your streets like showers.
For the sake of love and the bonds we keep,
We’ll sing and dance, our spirits leap.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Let us go, let us go, to the house of the Lord,
Where our hearts and souls are forever restored.

epigraph: Let us go into the house of the LORD
